name: Interaction Architecture
related_stage_3_constraints: async processing for OCR, translation, FX, notifications, and provider sync

ux_decisions.decision: Use scoped navigation with persistent trip context and nested private event context.
ux_decisions.rationale: Users need to understand whether they are acting in public, trip-private, or event-private scope.

ux_decisions.decision: Use explicit confirmation before public publication or public media promotion.
ux_decisions.rationale: Stage 2 and Stage 3 identified privacy leakage as a high-risk area.

ux_decisions.decision: Represent async work with pending, failed, retry, and manual fallback states.
ux_decisions.rationale: Receipt processing and provider sync are queue-backed and may fail independently.

interaction_patterns.name: Scope Banner
interaction_patterns.behavior: Show the current visibility and financial scope before sensitive actions.

interaction_patterns.name: External Provider Handoff
interaction_patterns.behavior: Explain the user is leaving Crewly and that contribution processing is handled by the provider.

interaction_patterns.name: Async Job Status
interaction_patterns.behavior: Show pending, complete, failed, retry, and manual fallback controls.

interaction_patterns.name: Permission-Aware Action States
interaction_patterns.behavior: Hide unavailable actions only when non-discoverable; otherwise show disabled action with reason.

feedback_patterns: toast or activity feed confirmation for low-risk saves
modal confirmation for public publish/promote actions
persistent status cards for async processing
clear permission-denied explanation with next available action

risks_and_constraints.risk: Nested private event context may be confused with trip-wide context.
risks_and_constraints.mitigation: Use persistent event scope labeling and separate ledger summaries.

risks_and_constraints.risk: Async processing may look broken if no durable status is visible.
risks_and_constraints.mitigation: Use status cards and retry/manual fallback actions.

stage_5_handoff_notes: Implement reusable scope banner, provider handoff, async status, and permission reason components.
